concepts.title: Chain complexes and homology
concepts.blurb: Complexes encode algebraic data with differentials, and homology measures failure of exactness.

concepts.title: Exact sequences
concepts.blurb: Exactness at B means im f = ker g; short exact sequences 0→A→B→C→0 are the atomic building blocks of homological algebra.

concepts.title: The snake lemma
concepts.blurb: A commutative diagram with exact rows yields a connecting map δ:ker γ → coker α and a six-term exact sequence linking kernels to cokernels.

concepts.title: The five lemma
concepts.blurb: In a commutative ladder of exact rows, if the four outer vertical maps are isomorphisms then so is the middle one — the workhorse diagram-chase for recognizing isomorphisms.

concepts.title: Long exact sequence in homology
concepts.blurb: A short exact sequence of chain complexes induces a long exact sequence in homology, built by iterating the snake-lemma connecting map in each degree.

concepts.title: Projective modules
concepts.blurb: A module P is projective iff every surjection onto P splits; equivalently P is a direct summand of a free module and makes Hom(P,−) exact.

concepts.title: Injective modules
concepts.blurb: Dual to projective: I is injective iff every injection of I extends; Baer's criterion and divisibility characterize injectives over ℤ.

concepts.title: Flat modules
concepts.blurb: M is flat iff −⊗M preserves exactness; localizations are flat, projectives are flat, and over ℤ flatness coincides with torsion-freeness.

concepts.title: Derived functors and Ext/Tor
concepts.blurb: Projective or injective resolutions define Ext and Tor as computable invariants; the Ext/Tor tables pin down extensions and torsion.

concepts.title: Resolutions: projective, injective, flat
concepts.blurb: Every module has projective and injective resolutions; their lengths measure the global dimension of the ring.

concepts.title: Abelian categories and triangulated preview
concepts.blurb: Abelian categories are the native habitat of homological algebra; triangulated categories encode long exact sequences as distinguished triangles.

concepts.title: Spectral sequences
concepts.blurb: Spectral sequences stage difficult computations into successive approximation pages.
